zh.Olivet,53169,Mayenne,Pays de la Loire,FR: 法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延奧利維特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy IV de LAVAL於大約1130年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾時，他的父親Guy III de Laval32歲，母親Emma Guyon31歲。他於大約1160年與Emma de CORNOUAILLES在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1181年1月1日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延奧利維特享年52歲，埋葬在法國麥延奧利維特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy IV de LAVAL于大约1130年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾时，他的父亲Guy III de Laval32岁，母亲Emma Guyon31岁。他于大约1160年与Emma de CORNOUAILLES在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1181年1月1日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延奧利維特享年52岁，埋葬在法国麥延奧利維特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: LAVAL
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Old French val (originally feminine, later masculine; see Val , compare Lavallee ), or a habitational name from Laval, the name of several places in various parts of France, ultimately derived from Latin vallis ‘valley’.

variants.name: Val
meanings: Spanish: variant of Valle , from val, a variant of valle ‘valley’. Compare Delval .
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, val (compare 3 below). Compare also Doval .

French and Haitian: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, (Old) French val (originally feminine, later masculine; compare Vallee ), from Latin vallis (feminine). Compare Duval and Laval .

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: When Guy IV de LAVAL was born about 1130, in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Guy III de Laval, was 32 and his mother, Emma Guyon, was 31. He married Emma de CORNOUAILLES about 1160, in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 1 January 1181, in Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 52, and was buried in Olivet, Mayenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy IV de LAVAL est né environ 1130, à Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Guy III de Laval, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Emma Guyon, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Emma de CORNOUAILLES environ 1160, à Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1181, à Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Olivet, Mayenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy IV de LAVAL um 1130 in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy III de Laval 32 und seine Mutter Emma Guyon 31. Er hat um 1160 in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Emma de CORNOUAILLES geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1181 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Olivet, Mayenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy IV de LAVAL è nato il circa 1130 nel Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Guy III de Laval, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Emma Guyon, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Emma de CORNOUAILLES circa 1160, nel Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Guy IV de LAVALが約1130年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンラヴァルで生まれた時，父Guy III de Lavalは32歳，母Emma Guyonは31歳であった。約1160年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンラヴァルでEmma de CORNOUAILLESと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1181年1月1日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンオリベトで52歳で死去し，フランスメイエンオリベトにて埋葬された。

ko.Laval,53130,Mayenne,Pays de la Loire,Fra: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발

ko.lifeSummary: Guy IV de LAVAL(이)가 대략 1130년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy III de Laval(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Guyon(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1160년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발에서 Emma de CORNOUAILLES(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1181년 1월 1일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라이베트에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 메이니 라이베트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy IV de LAVAL nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Guy III de Laval, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Emma Guyon, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma de CORNOUAILLES aproximadamente 1160, em Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1181, em Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Olivet, Mayenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy IV de LAVAL родился около 1130 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy III de Laval было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Emma Guyon, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de CORNOUAILLES около 1160 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 1 января 1181 г. в местности оливет, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности оливет, меиенн, Франция.

Se casó con Emma de CORNOUAILLES aproximadamente 1160, en Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas.
